name: Supabase Auth OTP
description: Deliver Supabase Auth phone OTPs over WhatsApp.
author: maplerichie

appName.title: App name
appName.description: Your app name, inserted into the message template's {appName} placeholder.

messageTemplate.title: Message template
messageTemplate.description: WhatsApp message body. {appName} and {otp} are replaced with the app name and one-time code. Keep it short; WhatsApp may require an approved template for business-initiated messages.

fallbackSessionId.title: Fallback WhatsApp session
fallbackSessionId.description: The WhatsApp session id to send from when the instance is not bound to a specific session (sessionScope is empty). Either bind the instance to a session OR set this fallback; otherwise the plugin cannot send messages.

debug.title: Debug mode
debug.description: Log every inbound request (resolved session + chatId), each outbound send, and send failures. Never blocks or skips WhatsApp sending. Signature verification and the session-liveness check happen host-side before this handler runs, so they are not logged here.
